sources.cleaned_content:
# Gyeon One Evo - 50 ml

Product Images:
![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-One-Evo-50-ml_2587_2_lw_4715.jpg)
![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-One-Evo-50-ml_2587_2_lw_4681.jpg)
![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-One-Evo-50-ml_2587_2_lw_3112.jpg)
![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-One-Evo-50-ml_2587_2_lw_4673.jpg)
![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-One-Evo-50-ml_2587_2_lw_5524.jpg)
![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-One-Evo-50-ml_2587_2_lw_6741.jpg)

Price: $62.99
Please note: this product cannot be shipped through the air.

Quantity Discounts:
- 2+ : $57.99 (8% savings)

Available Sizes:
- 30 ml - $47.99 ($1.60 / ml)
- 50 ml - $62.99 ($1.26 / ml)

### Product Information
- Incredibly easy to apply coating
- Evo technology improves durability and application
- Insane gloss and hydrophobic properties
- Product Codes: GY-2449, GY-2456

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 6 ratings)

### Product Description

Gyeon One Evo takes everything you love about the Gyeon One and improves on it! Gyeon One Evo is an easy to apply coating that will help protect your paint, while providing a great deal of gloss. In general, coatings do take a little more effort to apply than a wax and that can be intimidating to some detailing enthusiasts. Gyeon however, really went out of their way to come up with an easy to use formula, that is great for enthusiasts who want more protection and ease of application. According to Gyeon, One is as easy to apply as a traditional wax, provides a great level of gloss, yet is as durable and resistant as a regular coating. You can expect to use about 25ml - 30ml per vehicle and One Evo will last an estimated 24 months with proper care.

Gyeon coatings have been completely redesigned and this technology has never used before in car coatings. Evo products utilize a world-first use of the fluoro-modified polisylazane technology that pushes the Evo line to the forefront of car coatings. This technology means extended durability, extreme chemical resistance, longer lasting performance, and only one layer is needed. It remains easy to apply and much easier wipe off than before.

Note: All Evo formulas can be applied outdoors. Avoid direct sun and ideally do not get wet in the first 12 hours after application.

### Video: A guide to Q One EVO
![image](https://img.youtube.com/vi/YW5hrcT5Bq8/hqdefault.jpg)

### From The Label

Product Description:
- Self Cleaning Properties
- Prevents UV Damage
- Guards Against the Elements
- Water Repellent

Directions:
Recommended hand and skin protection. Work in a well-ventilated area. Keep in a dark, dry, and cool place. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

### Customer Reviews

Albert V. (DI Verified Purchase) - 7/27/2024 - Would buy again: Yes
I used this for the first time and I was impressed with the results. Gyeon recommends that you wipe on and remove upon doing so. I applied One and waited for a flash about 30 or so seconds, and the removal was great.

Eduardo T. (DI Verified Purchase) - 1/15/2024 - Would buy again: Yes
I've used MOHS on several vehicles and this is my first time using ONE. Very easy to apply and easy to remove. The results are fantastic and my client was very happy. Applied it in some sunlight and had no issues whatsoever. Highly recommend especially if you're a first time user. Very forgiving.

Josh B. (DI Verified Purchase) - 9/5/2023 - Would buy again: Yes
Great product, laid down nicely, impressed with the results. First time using this product, second time coating a car. I'll be staying in the Gyeon product line for coatings now.

# GYEON Q² One EVO Lightbox

Brand: Gyeon

Product Images:
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-one-evo-lightbox.png?v=1639784714&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/gyeon-one-evo-carzilla_47a948f7-90be-4300-8a33-d2bf3e596275.jpg?v=1665615165&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/Q2_ONE_EVO_bottle_30_f7b15eda-eb23-43e6-bcf5-2898489a0ebf.png?v=1665615165&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/Q2_ONE_EVO_bottle_50_0c70bc3e-155e-4c30-a814-701b0d50d2bc.png?v=1665615165&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/Q2_ONE_EVO_bottle_100_95f7faf7-6319-42e6-a8b9-6bbea94f50d6.png?v=1665615165&width=1800)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/Gyeon-One-Evo-ceramic-coating_2_3bc85ed4-6226-4977-bc8e-b33af2290d88.jpg?v=1665615165&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/Gyeon-One-Evo-ceramic-coating_3_67fef2b3-1d4c-46fb-b365-8778636bfa44.jpg?v=1665615165&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/Gyeon-One-Evo-ceramic-coating_4_e9971ce9-605a-4194-b31e-1d96960a30b6.jpg?v=1665615165&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/Gyeon-One-Evo-ceramic-coating_5_a466e6bb-2eeb-4b67-8f75-df83b85d0885.jpg?v=1665615165&width=1800)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/Gyeon-one-EVO_6193fde1-3ae6-467d-bb34-3e2f31c68a9e.jpg?v=1665615165&width=1800)

Prices:
- 30ml - $59.00 CAD
- 50ml - $78.00 CAD
- 100ml - $135.00 CAD
- 100ml Non-EVO - $115.00 CAD

3%+ Discount with 3+ of the Same Item

Variant Barcodes:
- 30ml: 8809432672449
- 50ml: 8809432672456
- 100ml: 8809432670070

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/MG_5068-min_.1.jpg?v=1701904787&width=1080)
![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/GYEON_EVO_ONE_1.3.jpg?v=1701904811&width=1080)

## NO GARAGE? NO PROBLEM!
All EVO formulas can be applied outdoors. Ensure stable conditions, never use in direct sunlight and check the weather forecast! The coating should not get wet in the first 12 hours after application.

- CONSUMPTION: 25-30ml/car
- PH TOLERANCE: 2-11
- DURABILITY: Up to 24 MONTHS / 25K KM

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-one-evo-application.jpg?v=1701989790&width=2400)

### BEST PRACTICE & PRO-TIPS
Apply the product liberally in your favourite motion in small sections - maximum 50x50cm. Wipe off immediately with either the Q²M SoftWipe or Q²M PolishWipe. Q² One EVO builds a thick layer, so you will need an absorbent towel.
TIP: The choice of towels for coating wipe off is extremely important. Do not stick to just one type - depending on paint and climate, even the Q²M Suede might be the best choice for perfecting the surface.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/one-1-1200x704.png?v=1701906584&width=2400)

### WHY GYEON ONE EVO?
One EVO combines the advantages of all forms of protection. It remains as easy to apply as natural wax and as durable and resistant as a regular coating. It is the ideal choice for enthusiasts seeking to transition from wax/sealant to ceramic coating. Additionally, it delivers superb beading and intense candy gloss without straining your budget!

# GYEON One EVO Light box 30ml, 50ml, 100ml

## Advanced quartz technology combined with user friendly characteristics

![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/evo-text_480x480.jpg?v=1639781124)

MAJOR FEATURES:
- EASY AND STRAIGHT FORWARD APPLICATION
- HIGH CANDY GLOSS
- ENTRY LEVEL PRICE TAG

BIGGEST IMPROVEMENT:
- 100% MORE DURABILITY COMPARED WITH Q² ONE
- MORE CHEMICAL RESISTANCE
- OUTDOOR APPLICATION FRIENDLY

### Ceramic Coating kit 30ml or 50ml
Q² One brings the benefits of all forms of protection together. As easy to apply as a natural wax, glossy like a real glaze, durable and resistant as regular coatings. This fast-curing formula does not require special equipment and transforms your garage into a detailing studio.

BOX CONTAINS: Q2 ONE Evo / MANUAL / APPLICATOR

### HYDROPHOBIC
With its superb beading, Q² One meets the expectations of detailing enthusiasts. A high water contact angle of over 110' results in spectacular water behaviour and helps with regular maintenance.

### SUPERB SELF-CLEANING ABILITIES
One of the key characteristics of Q² One, especially when compared with other protective coatings, is its excellent self-cleaning ability. This ability can significantly extend the intervals between washes. Of course, the coating does not remain perfectly clean after a long drive in bad weather, but it does considerably help, and also makes it a lot easier to safely remove residual dirt afterwards.

### ADVICE ON APPLICATION AND PRECAUTIONS
Before you start applying make sure that the surface is oil free and completely dry. It is recommended to wash the car with Q²M Bathe, use Q²M Iron and Q²M Tar to remove impurities and degrease with Q²M Prep. Skin protection recommended. Work in a well-ventilated area. Store in a dark, dry and cool place. Keep out of reach of children. Never apply in direct sunlight.

Specifications:
- CONSUMPTION: 15ml/layer
- HARDNESS: 9H
- CONTACT ANGLE: >110'
- PH TOLERANCE: 2-11
- THICKNESS: 0,2 - 0,5qm
- DURABILITY: UP TO 24 MONTHS / 25K KMs

All GYEON products does not contain any Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances (PFAS / 'forever chemicals') as defined or restricted under the relevant Canadian environmental and chemical management regulations, including but not limited to:
- The Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA) and its associated
- Prohibition of Certain Toxic Substances Regulations, 2012 (SOR/2012-285), as amended;
- The Domestic Substances List and Non-domestic Substances List under CEPA;
- Any applicable federal or provincial restrictions pertaining to PFAS substances.

Outdoor-friendly application: All EVO formulas can be applied outdoors. Ensure stable conditions, never use in direct sunlight and check the weather forecast! The coating should not get wet in the first 12 hours after application.

Easy & Durable: With the introduction of EVO formulas, applying Q² One EVO is now even simpler than before. It offers significantly enhanced durability, improved by 50% compared to its previous version. The increased performance and higher chemical resistance make it an excellent entry-level coating for enthusiasts.

Glossy & Hydrophobic: With its superb beading, Q² One EVO meets all the expectations of car care enthusiasts. However, beading would mean nothing without the intense candy gloss.

One EVO vs GYEON's other coating: GYEON One EVO is perfect for first-timers, offering a balance of cost and effectiveness without compromising quality. If you're new to coating or transitioning from wax/sealant applications, One EVO is an ideal choice. It's easy to apply with minimal risk of leaving 'high spots.'

## GYEON ONE EVO FAQs

Q: How long does it last?
A: This depends on several factors. Is the vehicle primarily used in the summer or winter? How frequently is it maintained and topped up with Gyeon Cure or Gyeon Ceramic Detailer? For our Canadian climate, we often recommend applying two layers. While this won't double the coating's longevity, it can still provide a significant boost, around 20% or more, compared to a single-layer application.
Since the vehicle is already clean and prepped, it's a good idea to apply a second layer. While the preparation process may take some time, the application itself is straightforward. Below is the timeframe under monthly maintenance with Gyeon Cure or Gyeon Ceramic Detailer:
- Summer driven only (garage kept): at least 24 months or beyond
- Summer driven with no garage: ~24 months
- Winter driven only (garage kept): 18 to 24 months
- Winter/Daily driven with no garage: ~12 months
- Daily driven (garage kept): ~18 months
In winter, maintenance becomes crucial for its longevity for daily/winter-driven cars. Without regular maintenance or reapplication during the winter months (understandably challenging in -30°C weather), you may notice wear and deterioration on the lower sections due to road salts, chemicals, contaminants, and other factors. After a thorough decontamination, water beading may return, but it's not uncommon for the lower sections to show signs of wear after winter. The key takeaway is that the coating is designed to wear off first, protecting the paint beneath.

Q: When do I wipe it off?
A: This depends on the ambient temperature, but it is recommended to wipe off within the first 10 to 30 seconds after applying to the entire panel/section. If the room temperature is higher, work section by section. If cooler, proceed panel by panel. You have up to a 5-minute wipe-off window to return and check your work, ensuring you haven't missed any spots.

Q: What's the layering time?
A: We typically recommend waiting between 2 to 4 hours between layers, but it's best not to exceed 24 hours. The reason for this is that if you wait too long, you'll be applying the second layer onto a surface that has already hardened and become slick, and the bonding won't be as effective. On the other hand, if you apply the second layer too quickly, the solvents in the second layer can soften the first layer, essentially merging them into one. Ideally, you want to apply the second layer when the first layer is still in the process of curing, so they can bond cohesively.

Q: How much will the bottle do?
A: With the new EVOs, a 30ml bottle can equate to a 50ml bottle of the previous-gen product. For a mid-sized vehicle, such as a Camry, you can expect to use approximately 15ml per layer. A mid-sized SUV will require around 20ml, and a full-sized truck will typically use between 25 to 30ml. It's important to note that applying two coats does make a noticeable difference.

Q: What can I layer it with?
A: You can layer One EVO with another layer of One EVO or CanCoat EVO. The general rule of thumb is to apply the most durable product first and the slicker product on top. A popular combination, for the best of both worlds, using One EVO as the first layer (providing the candy gloss finish) and then applying CanCoat EVO on top because it's a slicker product that can efficiently repel dirt.

Q: After coating, when can I take the vehicle out?
A: A general rule of thumb is to avoid water contact for 24 to 48 hours and refrain from using soap for a week. However, after the coating is applied, you can take the vehicle out immediately. Dust, dew, and wind won't have much effect, but it's important to be mindful of bugs, which can impact the finish. It's important to understand that drying and curing are distinct processes. While the coating or panel may feel dry to the touch right away, curing involves the molecular locking process, and it requires time to fully cure.

Q: How cold (or hot) can I apply the coating under?
A: A temperature of at least 10°C is recommended, although you can still attempt the application between 5°C to 10°C if necessary. If the temperature reaches 30°C, then it's on the warmer side, and you will need to retreat into the shade. Ideally, you want the coating to remain on the panel for at least 30 to 60 seconds without flashing right away.

Q: Can I apply the coating outdoors?
A: Absolutely, all the new Gyeon EVO coatings can be applied outdoors; just be mindful of the temperature.

Q: What do I maintain it with and how often?
A: You can use products like Gyeon WetCoat, Cure, Ceramic Detailer, etc., as frequently as you'd like. The only thing to caution about is using waxes on your coating (Gyeon Wax is fine) because most waxes have strong solvents that may affect the coating.

Q: I have a 'high-spot', what do I do?
A: High spots refer to dried coatings that were not completely buffed off. If you catch the high spots within 30 minutes, you can use the coating itself again to level/soften the high spots. If it's been a few days, then you'll need to mechanically polish it off or use Gyeon Total Remover to remove and reapply coating on the affected area.

Q: What can I wash it with afterwards?
A: Any pH-neutral soap is suitable for use, and Gyeon recommends Bathe and Bathe+. Ideally, avoid using wash and 'wax' products. While you can use them, it's worth noting that a wash and 'wax' product tends to diminish the water-beading properties of your coating.

Q: What's the expiration date? New and opened.
A: Officially, Gyeon recommends the product to be used within 2 to 3 years when new. If the bottle has been opened, it's best to use up the product in 1 to 2 months to preserve the coating's maximum effectiveness.

Q: Can I apply it on PPF, Trim, Plastics, Wheels, Chrome and Windows?
A: The short answer is Yes.
- PPF: Since the material is more porous and grabbier, you'll need to wipe off the coating at a faster rate. It's best to use Gyeon PPF Coating.
- Trim & Plastics: Yes, though it will not darken and 'restore' like Gyeon Trim does.
- Wheels, Chrome & Metal: Yes. You can also consider Gyeon's more cost-effective alternative for wheels, Gyeon Rim (also heat resistant)
- Windows: Technically yes, but avoid the front windshield, as certain wiper/washer fluid combos may chatter. Use Gyeon View or QuickView for chatter-free experience.

Q: Can it be shipped in the cold?
A: No problem at all. Coatings contain a significant amount of solvents and exhibit high chemical stability.

sources.page_title: Q² One EVO | Gyeon Quartz USA
sources.cleaned_content:
# Q² One EVO

Price: $47.99

Sizes available: 30ml Light Box, 50ml Light Box

Q² ONE EVO delivers an easy single-layer installation, candy gloss, and long-term protection at a great price. If this is your first ceramic coating application, Q² ONE EVO is the perfect easy ceramic coating for you. It is specifically designed for the new DIY enthusiast with its ease of use and impressive performance. With 24+ months of durability, this coating is hard to beat.

Box contains: Q² ONE EVO / Q²M COATING APPLICATOR LIGHT / INSTRUCTION MANUAL / MAINTENANCE BOOKLET MINI / DOOR STICKERS / #GYEONIZED STICKER

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/f682c465-18ee-4365-9e45-f3474d12c5ab/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/lighter/)
![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/d43b9ee1-82a7-49c1-b3ed-5602fc2a7c17/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/lighter/)

## STRONG SELF CLEANING
One of the key characteristics of Q ONE EVO, especially when compared with other protective coatings, is its excellent self-cleaning ability. And now with an even easier application and longer durability. This ability can significantly extend the intervals between washes.

## VERY HYDROPHOBIC
Q ONE EVO presents superb water beading. For the enthusiast detailer or part time professional, this easy ceramic coating provides a cost effective high performance ceramic coating that can be installed in any working environment with success.

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/735537a9-42fe-4360-bb6b-6313ee76e27e/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/lighter/)

## PRO TIP
Apply the product in a cross hatched pattern and in small sections - maximum shoulder width. Wipe off immediately with either the Q M SoftWipe or Q M PolishWipe. Q ONE EVO builds a thick layer of coating, so you will need an absorbent towel.
TIP: The choice of towels for coating is extremely important. Do not stick to just one type - depending on paint and climate.

Specifications:
- CONSUMPTION: 25-30ml/car
- PH TOLERANCE: 2-11
- DURABILITY: up to 24 months / 25kkm
